title: Claude Fable 5 is here!
summary: YouTube video reviewing Claude Fable 5 capabilities including reasoning, ray tracing, 3D reconstruction, music composition, and chemistry. Compares performance against GPT 5.5 and discusses model specifications and performance benchmarks.
writeup: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5 (also called Claude Mythos 5), measuring it against GPT 5.5 across several benchmarks and capability demonstrations. The tests span ray tracing, 3D reconstruction, music composition, and chemistry. The format pairs benchmark results with hands-on demonstrations to gauge where each model performs better.
